name: sameeh-skills
description: A growing, hand-built collection of Agent Skills for Claude Code — each one a self-contained, installable capability.

plugins.name: project-blueprint
plugins.description: Turn a project idea into one self-contained HTML file with four tabs: an interactive Decisions log, a full PRD, Mermaid diagrams (class/component/sequence/activity/state), and hands-on teaching widgets. Ships a configurable light/dark design system.
